recommendations.title: The Lunchbox
recommendations.overview: A mistaken delivery in Mumbai's famously efficient lunchbox delivery system (Mumbai's Dabbawallahs) connects a young housewife to a stranger in the dusk of his life. They build a fantasy world together through notes in the lunchbox. Gradually, this f

recommendations.title: Satanic Panic
recommendations.overview: A pizza delivery girl is suddenly in for the fight of her young life when encountering a group of Satanists in need of a virgin to ritually sacrifice.

recommendations.title: Resident Evil: Vendetta
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Horror
recommendations.overview: When a fearless enemy out for revenge unleashes a brutal and deadly new virus, BSAA captain Chris Redfield enlists the help of Agent Leon S. Kennedy and Professor Rebecca Chambers to bring down the death merchant and save New York City.

recommendations.title: The Flood
recommendations.overview: A horde of giant hungry alligators is unleashed on a group of in-transit prisoners and their guards after a massive hurricane floods Louisiana.

recommendations.title: Mosul
recommendations.overview: An Iraqi journalist joins an army of uneasy allies and unforgettable characters in the epic battle to liberate the city of Mosul from the Islamic State.

recommendations.title: Jimmy Carr: Funny Business
recommendations.overview: British comedian Jimmy Carr unleashes his deadpan delivery and wickedly funny one-liners to a sold-out audience at the UK's Hammersmith Apollo.

recommendations.title: Gremlins
recommendations.overview: After receiving an exotic small animal as a Christmas gift, a young man inadvertently breaks three important rules concerning his new pet, which unleashes a horde of malevolently mischievous creatures on a small town.

recommendations.title: Deadstream
recommendations.overview: A disgraced internet personality attempts to win back his followers by livestreaming one night alone in a haunted house. But when he accidentally unleashes a vengeful spirit, his big comeback event becomes a real-time fight for his life.

recommendations.title: Scouts Guide to the Zombie Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: Three scouts and lifelong friends join forces with one badass cocktail waitress to become the world’s most unlikely team of heroes.  When their peaceful town is ravaged by a zombie invasion, they’ll fight for the badge of a lifetime and put their sco

recommendations.title: Fonzy
recommendations.overview: Set in Paris, a man working in fish delivery becomes involved in a legal battle with his sperm donations.
